import os
import json
import torch
from pathlib import Path
print('Train script placeholder - baseline uses pretrained PI0. No fine-tuning in iter 0.')
# Save a dummy checkpoint for eval compatibility
ckpt_dir = Path('checkpoints/base')
ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
with open(ckpt_dir / 'config.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump({'model': 'pi0_base', 'trained': False}, f)
torch.save({'step': 0}, ckpt_dir / 'best.pt')
print('Dummy checkpoint saved to checkpoints/base/best.pt')
